# Overview
## Objective
+ Repeat the same process for other crops as I did for wheat (but I will not create separate files for each crop type, as I did for wheat).
+ For each crop, I will merge the crop calendar data with the water consumption data using `ID` in the calendar data and `ClimateID` in the water consumption data as the common key.

## Process



```{r}
#/*--------------------------------*/
#' ## Preparation
#/*--------------------------------*/
crop_correspondence_dt <- 
  fread(here("Data/Processed/CropGBWater_FAO_Ky_Kc.csv")) %>%
  .[!CropGBWater_crop %in% c("Wheat_winter_fullcover", "Wheat_winter", "Wheat_spring")]

ls_CropGBWater_crop <- crop_correspondence_dt$CropGBWater_crop


# --- Chekc --- #
# ls_crop_calender_file <- 
#   list.files(
#     here("Data/Raw/CropGBWater/CropCalendarFolders"),
#     full.names = FALSE
#   )

# setdiff(ls_CropGBWater_crop, ls_crop_calender_file)
```


```{r}
for(crop_i in ls_CropGBWater_crop) {
  # crop_i = ls_CropGBWater_crop[1]

  message("Processing crop: ", crop_i)

  #/*--------------------------------*/
  #' ## Compile crop calender data
  #/*--------------------------------*/
  ls_calender_file <- 
    list.files(
      here("Data/Raw/CropGBWater/CropCalendarFolders", crop_i),
      full.names = TRUE
    )
  # length(ls_calender_file)
  
  stopifnot(length(ls_calender_file) > 0)

  calender_dt <- 
    rbindlist(
      lapply(ls_calender_file, fread),
      use.names = TRUE,
      fill = TRUE
    )
  
  if (!"ID" %in% names(calender_dt)) {
    stop("Calendar file for ", crop_i, " does not contain ID column.")
  }
  
  if (uniqueN(calender_dt$ID) != nrow(calender_dt)) {
    warning("Calendar ID is not unique for crop: ", crop_i)
  }

  if(any(names(calender_dt) %in% "Total")){
    setnames(calender_dt, "Total", "Totalperiod")
  }

  calender_dt_key <- 
    calender_dt[,
      .(
        ClimateID = ID,
        Kc_ini,
        Kc_mid,
        Kc_end,
        L_ini,
        L_dev,
        L_mid,
        L_late,
        J_plant,
        Month,
        Day,
        Totalperiod
      )
    ]

  #/*--------------------------------*/
  #' ## Merge with 
  #/*--------------------------------*/
  # --- Load CropGBWater water consumption data --- #
  wc_file <- here("Data/Raw/CropGBWater/Data_S5_Y2020_WC_mm_gridded", paste0("Data_S5_Y2020_", crop_i, "_grid_avg.csv"))

  if (!file.exists(wc_file)) {
    stop("Water-consumption file does not exist: ", wc_file)
  }
  
  wc_dt <- fread(wc_file)
  
  if (!"ClimateID" %in% names(wc_dt)) {
    stop("Water-consumption file for ", crop_i, " does not contain ClimateID.")
  }

  merged_dt <- 
    merge(
      wc_dt,
      calender_dt_key,
      by = "ClimateID",
      all.x = TRUE
    )
  
  if (nrow(merged_dt) != nrow(wc_dt)) {
    stop("Merge expanded or reduced rows for crop: ", crop_i)
  }

  out_file <- here("Data/Processed/CropGBWater/wc", paste0(crop_i, "_grid_avg.csv"))

  fwrite(merged_dt, out_file)
}
```
